title: Increasing Column Length for "Connect Boards" in Forms
excerpt: In forms, the “Connect Boards” column is shorter than other columns. This results in item names being cut off when selecting connected items, causing inconvenience. Is it possible to increase the column length for this w…

posts.author: davelight (JaeHyeok Lee)
posts.cookedHtml: In forms, the “Connect Boards” column is shorter than other columns. This results in item names being cut off when selecting connected items, causing inconvenience. Is it possible to increase the column length for this within forms?
